title: Scoruluce Smooth Swords
description: A smooth edit of swords of faithful classics 32x32. by @Scoruluce (small sword versions incoming)
body:
# **Scoruluce Smooth Swords Resource Pack (Beta)**

Scoruluce Smooth Swords (SSS) is a resource pack designed to enhance the flat swords from the [Faithful Classic 32x32](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-faithful-32x-programmer-art) pack. SSS swords have a high level of detail thanks to color gradients and intricate designs for each sword.

![Texture of all the swords ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c6a7dd2db8a5d8c3899189ae6fcf6fdffaee26e.png)

This pack is currently in beta, and while I've put a lot of effort into making it, there may still be some bugs. I rely on our community to help me improve the pack by reporting any issues and suggesting tweaks via my GitHub page.

**Features:**
- Enhanced sword textures based on the [Faithful Classic 32x32](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-faithful-32x-programmer-art) pack.
- Detailed textures.

# **How to Contribute:**
Found a bug or have an idea for improvement? Please report it on my GitHub page. Your contributions help me make this pack better for everyone!

Thank you for trying out Scoruluce Smooth Swords. I hope you enjoy it.
